description:
KB-503 Follow-up: Complete --project flag integration for remaining commands

Complete the --project flag integration for all remaining commands:

## Task Commands (remaining)
- runTaskMove - Add projectName parameter
- runTaskUpdate - Add projectName parameter  
- runTaskLog - Add projectName parameter
- runTaskLogs - Add projectName parameter
- runTaskMerge - Add projectName parameter
- runTaskDuplicate - Add projectName parameter
- runTaskArchive - Add projectName parameter
- runTaskUnarchive - Add projectName parameter
- runTaskDelete - Add projectName parameter
- runTaskPause - Add projectName parameter
- runTaskUnpause - Add projectName parameter
- runTaskRetry - Add projectName parameter
- runTaskComment - Add projectName parameter
- runTaskSteer - Add projectName parameter
- runTaskAttach - Add projectName parameter
- runTaskPrCreate - Add projectName parameter
- runTaskImportFromGitHub - Add projectName parameter
- runTaskRefine - Add projectName parameter
- runTaskPlan - Add projectName parameter

## Other Commands
- Update settings commands (runSettingsShow, runSettingsSet) with --project support
- Update git commands with --project support
- Update backup commands with --project support

## CLI Integration
- Add --project/-P flag extraction in bin.ts main() function
- Pass projectName to all command handlers
- Add tests for cross-project operations

## Documentation
- Update AGENTS.md with multi-project CLI usage examples
- Create changeset for the feature

Pattern: Import getStore from project-context.js, add projectName?: string parameter, pass to getStore(projectName).

log.outcome: The specification is comprehensive, accurate, and ready for implementation. The task correctly identifies the pattern from KB-503 (`getStore(projectName)` from `project-context.ts`) and systematically applies it to ~20 task commands plus settings, git, and backup commands. File references are accurate, line numbers are approximately correct, and the implementation patterns are clearly documented.
